products.title: Discord Moderation Bot
products.description: Staff Management Bot - A comprehensive Discord bot for managing staff operations, moderation, and analytics.
products.fullDescription: The advanced staff management system designed for large-scale Discord communities with complete moderation control, performance tracking, and automated workflows. Features include auto-moderation, reaction roles, music playback, leveling system, and comprehensive logging.

reviews.reviewText: Best moderation bot I've ever used. The auto-moderation features are incredible.
Great bot, but could use more customization options. Overall very satisfied.

products.title: Music Bot Pro
products.description: Premium music bot with high-quality audio streaming and advanced queue management.
products.fullDescription: Experience crystal-clear music playback with our advanced Discord music bot. Features include high-quality audio streaming, custom playlists, DJ commands, audio effects, and seamless integration with your Discord server.

reviews.reviewText: Amazing sound quality and very easy to use!

products.title: Leveling System
products.description: Engage your community with a complete leveling and rewards system.
products.fullDescription: Boost server engagement with our comprehensive leveling system. Users earn XP through messages, voice activity, and interactions. Custom roles, rewards, leaderboards, and achievements keep your community active and motivated.

products.title: Custom Web Dashboard
products.description: Beautiful analytics dashboard for your Discord server management.
products.fullDescription: A modern, responsive web dashboard that integrates with your Discord bot. Monitor server statistics, manage settings, view analytics, and control your bot from anywhere with a beautiful intuitive interface.
